nodes.name: GitHub CI Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives POST from GitHub Actions. Payload now includes test_results array inline — no artifact download needed.

nodes.name: Call Claude API
nodes.notes: Results are sent inline in the webhook body — no artifact download needed.

nodes.name: Format PR Comment
nodes.notes: Parses Claude's JSON response and formats it as a readable Markdown comment for the GitHub PR.

nodes.name: Is this a PR?
nodes.notes: Only post a PR comment if this was triggered by a pull_request event.

nodes.name: Post GitHub PR Comment
nodes.notes: Posts the formatted analysis as a comment on the GitHub Pull Request.

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes: Sends a response back to CI so it doesn't time out.

meta.description: CS4218 AI-driven testing: receives inline test results from GitHub Actions CI, calls Claude API for analysis, and posts findings as a PR comment.
